title: 4 Reasons to be Bullish on Norwegian Cruise Line Stock
text: Passenger revenue surpassed 2019 levels by 24% in the fourth quarter of last year. Occupancy is expected to reach historical levels by mid-year.

title: Better Buy in 2023: Norwegian Cruise Line vs. Carnival Stock
text: Norwegian drove higher revenue in its last reported quarter than in 2019. Carnival enjoyed its best-ever quarter for bookings in fiscal Q1 2023.

title: Norwegian Cruise (NCLH) to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Norwegian Cruise's (NCLH) first-quarter 2023 results are likely to reflect gains from the resumption of cruise services, strong demand and improved booking trends.

title: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings to Hold Conference Call on First Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: MIAMI, April 21, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE: NCLH) (together with NCL Corporation Ltd., “Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings” or the “Company”) announced today it will report first quarter 2023 financial results on Monday, May 1, 2023 at 7:30 a.m. Eastern Time with a conference call and webcast to discuss results at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

title: 7 Most Undervalued Stocks to Buy Now
text: These seven companies are all household names, and they've all got seriously undervalued stocks that you should take a closer look at. The post 7 Most Undervalued Stocks to Buy Now appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: 3 Potential Bankruptcies That Could Shock the Market in 2023
text: When business-news outlets make bankruptcy predictions, no sector gets more attention than the retail industry.  I'm not sure why that is.
